mapper.select: SELECT id, title, subtitle, image_url, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at FROM carousel_items WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, title, subtitle, image_url, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at FROM carousel_items WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, title, subtitle, image_url, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at FROM carousel_items ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO carousel_items (title, subtitle, image_url, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{subtitle}, #{imageUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE carousel_items SET title = #{title}, subtitle = #{subtitle}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
